subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! Until now the world of divine knowledge hath been the arena of men and the field wherein males did venture forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه جهان عرفان تا بحال میدان مردان بود و جولانگاه ذکوران ولی
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
